_fixture_notes: Regression test for the Continuity rule. Yesterday's morning_brew (in recent_dan_output) led with 'Alex Cora is out' and used the signature phrases 'I respect the run' and 'Hope it works.' Today's rolling_7day shows another Sox loss, the firing is in latest_news because it's still being discussed, but the firing is now ~2 days old. Pass criteria: today's output does NOT lead paragraph 1 with 'Alex Cora is out' (re-introducing the firing as if new), does NOT close any paragraph with 'Hope it works,' and does NOT use 'I respect the run.' Either evolves the take with a callback ('two days into life without Cora,' 'the post-Cora era,' etc.) or shifts focus to a different storyline.

articles.headline: What's next for Red Sox after Alex Cora firing?
articles.description: Two days after the front office parted ways with manager Alex Cora and his coaching staff, the search for an interim manager continues.

recent_dan_output.headline: Pritchard lights up Philly as the Celtics push for another deep playoff run
morning_brew: Alex Cora is out, along with his coaching staff. An 11-17 record was the breaking point for ownership. I respect the run, particularly that 2018 championship, but this team needed a jolt and the front office finally pulled the trigger. Hope it works.
The club responded with a 5-3 win on the road against the Orioles, led by another Willson Contreras home run.
Bruins back at the Garden tonight, looking to even the series.

news_digest.headline: What's next for Alex Cora after being fired by Red Sox?
news_digest.dans_take: Alex Cora is out and it was a long time coming.

recent_dan_output.headline: Cora is out at Fenway as the Patriots reload during the draft
morning_brew: Alex Cora is out, along with his staff. Ten wins and seventeen losses was the breaking point. I respect the run, especially that 2018 title that felt like a juggernaut, but this team needed a jolt and ownership finally pulled the trigger. Hope it works.
Naturally the bats decide to show up right as the manager gets his walking papers. Seventeen runs on seventeen hits against the Orioles is a joke.
Patriots draft recap time. Round 1, pick 28: Caleb Lomu, OT out of Utah. Drake Maye needed better protection all year. Love it, glaring need addressed.

news_digest.headline: What's next for Alex Cora after being fired by Red Sox?
news_digest.dans_take: It is a massive shakeup for the staff, and now we wait to see who takes the reins.
